featured.title: Poll Results Show Close Three-Way Race Across Kongu Belt
featured.summary: Election results on April 25, 2026 reveal a competitive battle with NDA, ADMK and DMK vying for seats across the eight Kongu districts with surprising leads in key constituencies.

sideNews.title: Coimbatore Votes Record 72% Turnout; Counting Underway
sideNews.summary: Coimbatore recorded the highest voter participation in 25 years with 72% turnout as election commission officials count ballots through the night.

sideNews.title: Erode's Independent Candidates Emerge as Dark Horses in Results
sideNews.summary: Preliminary counts show unprecedented success for independent candidates in Erode, signalling voter frustration with traditional parties.

sideNews.title: Salem-Namakkal Constituency Heads to Photo Finish; Victory Margin Below 500 Votes
sideNews.summary: Salem-Namakkal contest remains too close to call with final count expected by evening, with less than 500 votes separating the top two contenders.

gridNews.title: Tiruppur's Market Buzz: Exit Polls and Stock Rally on Pro-Business Vibes
gridNews.summary: Exit polls suggesting pro-business policies have sparked a rally in Tiruppur's textile and manufacturing stocks as industry leaders await final results.

gridNews.title: Election Day Traffic: Kongu Highways See Reduced Congestion Post-Polls
gridNews.summary: With voting concluded, major highways across Coimbatore, Erode and Salem report smooth traffic flow as rally barricades are dismantled.

gridNews.title: Nilgiris Celebrates Historic Turnout; Remote Villages Record 65% Participation
gridNews.summary: Nilgiris district achieved remarkable polling participation from remote hill villages, with special polling stations set up in tribal settlements.

gridNews.title: Karur and Dharmapuri Exit Polls Predict Surprise Winners
gridNews.summary: Early exit polls from Karur and Dharmapuri districts are indicating unexpected winners, challenging pre-election predictions from political analysts.
